## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant Docker validation from `docs/VALIDATION.md`, or explained why it was not needed.
- [ ] I did not call live OK APIs while testing.
- [ ] I did not commit credentials, `.storage`, logs, Home Assistant databases, `.env` files, or unsanitized API captures.

## Notes

PR titles must use Conventional Commits, for example `feat: add charger diagnostics` or `fix(sensor): handle missing session cost`.
